spec_match.rationale: Models the Permissions-Policy: identity-credentials-get allow/deny matrix and shows the iframe rejecting the call when the policy denies — matches the spec's iframe-gating story.

interactive.rationale: A live matrix of toggle cells per IDP * embed, a mocked FedCM dialog that updates per toggle, and a code preview of the resulting Permissions-Policy header — clearly above the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature blurb sells 'a per-IDP allow/deny matrix mapping to Permissions-Policy: identity-credentials-get' — page implements exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: Allow/deny matrix is well covered. Missing: nested-iframe inheritance (deny at top, allow at child still blocked), wildcard 'self' vs explicit origin allowlist syntax, and the case where the iframe doesn't have allow= attribute at all.

references.rationale: Links chromestatus.com/feature/5176474637959168 in the see-also list.

design_system.rationale: Matrix cells, IDP rows, and toggle buttons all use CSS variables; the Continue/Cancel pair in the mock dialog overrides background+color explicitly (rule 6); no static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate Permissions-Policy inheritance
openQuestions.detail: If the top frame's Permissions-Policy denies identity-credentials-get, no child iframe can re-enable it even with allow=. The matrix UI currently flips per-cell as if each IDP * embed pair is independent. Add a 'top-level policy' toggle so authors see the inheritance rule and the cascade.

openQuestions.title: Show the literal Permissions-Policy / allow attribute syntax
openQuestions.detail: The page mentions Permissions-Policy: identity-credentials-get but doesn't show the full syntax — the allow attribute on iframe vs the response header on the top document, including the (self origin1 origin2) origin-list form. Add a side panel that emits both the response header and the iframe element attribute for the chosen matrix state.

openQuestions.title: Add the 'iframe with no allow attribute' default-deny case
openQuestions.detail: If an iframe omits allow=identity-credentials-get entirely, the call rejects. Authors hit this most often. Add an 'allow attribute missing' preset row to the matrix so the most common bug is demoed alongside the policy-driven cases.

summary: Strong policy-matrix demo. Add the inheritance cascade, the literal header/attribute syntax preview, and the 'no allow attribute' default-deny preset to make it the complete authoring tool for FedCM-in-iframe deployments.
